ddls:
CREATE TABLE "songs" (
  "song_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each song */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the song */,
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the artist who created the song */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genre the song belongs to */,
  "release_year" INTEGER /* Year the song was released */,
  "bpm" INTEGER /* Beats per minute (BPM) of the song */,
  "energy" REAL /* Energy level of the song */,
  "danceability" REAL /* Danceability of the song */,
  "loudness" REAL /* Loudness of the song */,
  "liveness" REAL /* Liveness of the song */,
  "valence" REAL /* Valence of the song */,
  "duration" REAL /* Duration of the song in seconds */,
  "acousticness" REAL /* Acousticness of the song */,
  "speechiness" REAL /* Speechiness of the song */,
  "popularity" REAL /* Popularity of the song */,
  "lyrics" TEXT /* Lyrics of the song */,
  "composer" TEXT /* Composer of the song */,
  "producer" TEXT /* Producer of the song */,
  "filename" TEXT /* Filename of the song */,
  "filesize" INTEGER /* Filesize of the song */,
  "filetype" TEXT /* Filetype of the song */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("song_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_songs_genre_id FOREIGN KEY ("genre_id") REFERENCES genres ("genre_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_songs_artist_id FOREIGN KEY ("artist_id") REFERENCES artists ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "artists" (
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each artist */,
  "artist_name" TEXT /* Name of the artist */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genre the artist primarily belongs to */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biography of the artist */,
  "birthdate" TEXT /* Birthdate of the artist */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* Profile picture of the artist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the genre */,
  "parent_genre" TEXT /* Parent genre of the current genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "playlists" (
  "playlist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each playlist */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the playlist */,
  "playlist_name" TEXT /* Name of the playlist */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the playlist */,
  "visibility" TEXT /* Visibility of the playlist (public/private) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the playlist was created */,
  "modified_at" TEXT /* Date the playlist was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("playlist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playlists_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "playlist_songs" (
  "playlist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the playlist */,
  "song_id" INTEGER /* ID of the song */,
  "added_at" TEXT /* Date the song was added to the playlist */,
  "added_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who added the song */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("playlist_id", "song_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user's account */,
  "firstname" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "lastname" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "birthdate" TEXT /* Birthdate of the user */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the user */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* Profile picture of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the user's account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collaborations" (
  "collaboration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collaboration */,
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the primary artist */,
  "collaborating_artist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the collaborating artist */,
  "song_id" INTEGER /* ID of the song resulting from the collaboration */,
  "collaboration_type" TEXT /* Type of collaboration (e.g., featuring, producing) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collaboration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_collaborating_artist_id FOREIGN KEY ("collaborating_artist_id") REFERENCES artists ("artist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_artist_id FOREIGN KEY ("artist_id") REFERENCES artists ("artist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_song_id FOREIGN KEY ("song_id") REFERENCES songs ("song_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "followings" (
  "following_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each following */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who is following */,
  "followed_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user being followed */,
  "followed_at" TEXT /* Date the following was initiated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("following_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_followings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_followings_followed_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("followed_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "playlist_followers" (
  "playlist_follower_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each playlist follower */,
  "playlist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the playlist being followed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who is following the playlist */,
  "followed_at" TEXT /* Date the following was initiated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("playlist_follower_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playlist_followers_playlist_id FOREIGN KEY ("playlist_id") REFERENCES playlists ("playlist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playlist_followers_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "search_history" (
  "search_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each search */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the search */,
  "search_query" TEXT /* Query searched by the user */,
  "searched_at" TEXT /* Date the search was performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("search_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_search_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "songplays" (
  "songplay_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each song play */,
  "song_id" INTEGER /* ID of the song that was played */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who played the song */,
  "played_at" TEXT /* Date the song was played */,
  "played_on" TEXT /* Device or platform the song was played on */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("songplay_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_songplays_song_id FOREIGN KEY ("song_id") REFERENCES songs ("song_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_songplays_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
